errors.title: Recognition Issue
errors.tipContent: For best results, take photos in good lighting with the document flat and fully visible in the frame.

format.1: Ensure the file is in JPG, PNG, or PDF format
format.2: Try converting the file to a different format
format.3: Make sure the file is not corrupted

size.1: Compress the image to around 5MB if possible
size.2: Reduce image resolution if too large
size.3: Try uploading a smaller portion of the document

quality.1: Retake the photo in better lighting
quality.2: Ensure the document is flat and not wrinkled
quality.3: Hold the camera steady to avoid blur
quality.4: Make sure the entire document is visible in the frame
quality.5: Avoid shadows and glare on the document

lowConfidence.1: Review and correct the extracted data manually
lowConfidence.2: Retake the photo with better quality
lowConfidence.3: Enter the data manually if recognition continues to fail

general.2: If the problem persists, enter the data manually

lighting.title: Good Lighting
lighting.description: Use natural light or bright indoor lighting. Avoid shadows and dark areas.

angle.title: Straight Angle
angle.description: Hold the camera directly above the document, not at an angle.

focus.title: Clear Focus
focus.description: Ensure the text is sharp and readable. Tap to focus if needed.

frame.title: Full Frame
frame.description: Include the entire document with a small margin around the edges.

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.section1Content: Taxja is an automated tax management tool designed to assist Austrian taxpayers with tracking income, expenses, and estimating tax obligations. This system is provided for informational and reference purposes only and does not constitute professional tax advice or tax consulting services.
disclaimer.section2Content: The calculations, suggestions, and information provided by Taxja are based on general Austrian tax law and the 2026 USP tax tables. However, tax situations can be complex and individual circumstances vary significantly. Taxja does not provide personalized tax advice and should not be relied upon as a substitute for professional consultation with a licensed Steuerberater (tax advisor).
disclaimer.limitation1: While we strive for accuracy, tax calculations may contain errors or may not account for all individual circumstances
disclaimer.limitation2: Tax laws and regulations change frequently; users are responsible for verifying current requirements
disclaimer.limitation3: Automatic document recognition may produce errors; users must verify all extracted data
disclaimer.limitation4: The system cannot account for all possible deductions, credits, or special circumstances
disclaimer.section4Content: All tax filings must be submitted through the official Austrian FinanzOnline system. The final tax assessment from the Austrian tax authorities (Finanzamt) is the only authoritative determination of your tax obligations. Taxja's calculations are estimates only.
disclaimer.section5Content: For complex tax situations, significant income changes, business operations, rental properties, or any uncertainty about tax obligations, we strongly recommend consulting a licensed Steuerberater. This system complies with Austrian Steuerberatungsgesetz (Tax Consulting Act) by explicitly not providing tax consulting services.
disclaimer.section6Content: OOHK (operator of Taxja) and its developers assume no liability for any tax-related decisions, penalties, interest, or financial consequences arising from the use of this system. Users are solely responsible for the accuracy of their tax filings and compliance with Austrian tax law.
disclaimer.section7Content: Taxja uses only strictly necessary cookies (authentication tokens) to keep you logged in. No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies are used. For details, see our Privacy Policy.
disclaimer.footerNotice: By using Taxja, you acknowledge that you understand these limitations and agree to use the system at your own risk.

legal.agbChangesContent: The provider reserves the right to change these terms when objectively necessary. Changes will be communicated to the user by email at least 30 days before taking effect. If the user does not object within this period, the amended terms are deemed accepted. In case of objection, the user has the right to terminate the contract.
legal.agbDataPortabilityContent: The user has the right pursuant to Art. 20 GDPR to receive their personal data in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format. Taxja provides a built-in export function (JSON/CSV) in account settings for this purpose. The user may export their data at any time and transfer it to another service.
legal.agbDisputeResolutionContent: Online dispute resolution pursuant to Art. 14(1) ODR Regulation: The European Commission provides an online dispute resolution platform (https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr). We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
legal.agbFinalContent: Austrian law applies, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. The mandatory provisions of the Austrian Consumer Protection Act (KSchG) apply to consumers. If individual provisions are invalid, the remaining provisions remain effective.
legal.datenschutzMeta: Pursuant to Art. 13 and 14 GDPR – As of: March 2026

legal.dataCollectedContent: Account data (name, email, password), tax-relevant data (AES-256 encrypted), financial data (transactions, receipts), technical data (IP, browser), payment data (via Stripe).
legal.dataSecurityContent: AES-256 encryption, PBKDF2-SHA256 password hashing, TLS encryption, data stored in the EU.
legal.processorsContent: Hosting (EU), Stripe Payments Europe Ltd. (Ireland), MinIO (self-hosted, EU). Contracts pursuant to Art. 28 GDPR.
legal.retentionContent: Account data until deletion, financial data at least 7 years (§ 132 BAO), log files max. 90 days, 30-day grace period after account deletion.
legal.rightsContent: Access (Art. 15), rectification (Art. 16), erasure (Art. 17), restriction (Art. 18), portability (Art. 20), objection (Art. 21), withdrawal of consent (Art. 7(3)). Requests to taxja@oohk.com.
legal.aiDataProcessingContent: When using the AI assistant, your queries and relevant context data are transmitted to an AI service provider (currently OpenAI, based in the USA). The transfer is based on Standard Contractual Clauses (Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR). Only data necessary for answering your query is transmitted. You may deactivate the AI assistant at any time without affecting other Taxja functionality.
legal.dataExportContent: Taxja provides a built-in data export function (JSON/CSV) in account settings.
legal.cookiesContent:
Taxja uses only strictly necessary cookies in accordance with Art. 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive and § 165(3) Austrian TKG 2021. No separate consent is required as these cookies are essential to provide the service you requested.

• access_token (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax): Authentication credential, valid for 30 minutes.
• refresh_token (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Strict): Enables automatic session renewal without re-login, valid for 7 days.
• Language preference: Stored in browser local storage (not a cookie).

All authentication cookies are protected with HttpOnly (no JavaScript access), Secure (HTTPS only), and SameSite (CSRF protection) flags. No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies are used.

welcome.title: Welcome to Taxja!
welcome.message: Hi! I'm your Taxja AI assistant. I'll guide you through the platform — from automatic document scanning and bank statement import to real-time tax calculations, AI-powered tax advice, and one-click tax filing. Taxja supports 9 languages and works for employees, freelancers, landlords, and businesses alike. Let me show you around!

documents.title: Smart Document Processing
documents.message: Upload invoices, receipts, contracts, or bank statements here. Our OCR and AI engine automatically extracts data, classifies documents, and creates transactions — no manual entry needed. Bank statements are processed through a dedicated reconciliation workbench, and employer tax certificates (Lohnzettel) have their own review panel. Review and confirm AI-extracted data before it enters your tax record.

dashboard.title: Your Tax Command Center
dashboard.message: The Dashboard gives you a real-time overview: income vs. expenses, estimated tax, paid taxes, remaining balance, net income, and VAT threshold tracking. Interactive trend charts show monthly patterns and category breakdowns. Use the year selector to switch tax years, drag-and-drop to upload documents, and check your subscription status — all in one screen.

transactions.title: Transaction Management
transactions.message: View, filter, and manage all income and expense records. Transactions are created automatically from documents and bank statement imports, or you can add them manually. Use filters to find specific entries, bulk-select for batch operations, export to CSV/PDF, and manage classification rules. Bank-reconciled transactions show a linked bank icon you can click.

reports.title: Tax Reports & Filing
reports.message: Generate professional reports: E/A income statement, balance sheet (Bilanz), trial balance (Saldenliste), and period trial balance. Preview and generate official tax forms (E1, E1a, U30) with pre-filled data. Export a complete tax package with all supporting documents, or submit electronically via FinanzOnline.

ai.title: AI Tax Advisor
ai.message: Your personal AI tax consultant is always available. Ask anything about Austrian tax law, deductions, VAT, or your situation — it knows your profile, properties, transactions, and documents. Every answer is personalized. It also proactively suggests optimizations and flags potential issues before you file.

profile.title: Your Tax Profile
profile.message: Configure your income type, tax number, VAT status, business details, employer info, and commuting data for Pendlerpauschale. Set family status for tax credits and home-office days for Homeoffice-Pauschale. The more complete your profile, the more accurate your calculations. Also manage security, export your data, or delete your account here.

year.title: Tax Year Selector
year.message: Choose the tax year to work with. All dashboard data — income, expenses, tax estimates, and charts — updates instantly when you switch years.

upload.title: Quick Document Upload
upload.message: Drag and drop files here or click to browse. Taxja accepts invoices, receipts, contracts, bank statements, and tax forms. OCR processing starts automatically and creates transactions from extracted data.

overview.title: Financial Overview Cards
overview.message: Key metrics at a glance: year-to-date income, expenses, estimated tax, paid tax, remaining balance, net income, and distance to VAT threshold. Each card is clickable for more details.

trends.title: Trend Charts
trends.message: Interactive charts showing monthly income vs. expenses, income category breakdown (pie chart), expense category breakdown, and year-over-year comparisons. Spot patterns and plan your tax strategy.

plan.title: Subscription & Credits
plan.message: View your current plan (Free, Plus, or Pro), remaining AI credits, and trial status. Click to manage your subscription or purchase additional credits.

language.title: Language Selector
language.message: Switch between 9 supported languages: German, English, Chinese, French, Russian, Hungarian, Polish, Turkish, and Bosnian. The entire interface updates instantly.

theme.title: Theme Toggle
theme.message: Switch between Classic (light) and Cyber (dark) themes. Classic mode uses clean, standard UI elements. Cyber mode features the animated robot assistant and dark backgrounds.

classRules.title: Classification Rules
classRules.message: Open the rules manager to view and edit automatic categorization rules. Taxja learns from your manual corrections and builds rules that auto-classify future transactions by description patterns.

export.title: Export Transactions
export.message: Download your transactions as CSV or PDF. Choose the format and date range for your records, tax advisor, or Finanzamt submission.

addNew.title: Add Transaction
addNew.message: Manually create a new income or expense entry. Use this when you don't have a document to upload — enter amount, date, category, VAT rate, and optional line items.

filters.title: Transaction Filters
filters.message: Filter by year, category, type (income/expense), needs-review status, and more. Combine filters to find exactly what you need. Use 'Needs Review' to quickly find transactions requiring confirmation.

list.title: Transaction List
list.message: All transactions in a sortable, paginated table. Each row shows date, description, amount, category, and status. The bank icon indicates bank-reconciled entries — click it to view the linked bank statement. The paperclip links to attached documents. Use checkboxes for bulk operations.

paging.title: Pagination
paging.message: Navigate through pages of transactions. Adjust the page size to show more or fewer entries per page.

upload.title: Upload Documents
upload.message: Upload invoices, receipts, bank statements, tax forms, employment documents, contracts, and more. Drag and drop multiple files at once. Taxja's OCR engine automatically extracts amounts, dates, vendors, and tax details.

tabs.title: Document Categories
tabs.message: Documents are organized by type and status: All, Pending Review (yellow triangle badge), Invoices, Receipts, Bank Statements, Tax Forms, Employment Documents, and more. The 'Needs Review' tab shows documents where AI extraction needs your confirmation.

list.title: Document List
list.message: Browse all uploaded documents with search and filters. Each entry shows the document name, type, upload date, and processing status. Click any document to open its detail view with OCR data, preview, and linked transactions.

header.title: Document Header
header.message: Shows the document name, type, upload date, and processing status. Action buttons let you re-process OCR, download the original file, or delete the document.

preview.title: Document Preview
preview.message: View the original uploaded document (PDF, image, etc.). Zoom in to verify details against the AI-extracted data on the right panel.

ocrData.title: AI-Extracted Data
ocrData.message: All fields extracted by OCR and AI: amount, date, vendor, category, VAT rate, line items, and more. Low-confidence fields are highlighted. Review each value and correct errors before confirming.

linked.title: Linked Records
linked.message: See which transaction, asset, or bank statement line is linked to this document. Create new links or navigate to the linked record directly from here.

editMode.title: Edit & Confirm
editMode.message: Switch to edit mode to correct AI-extracted values. Once you confirm, the data is locked in and the yellow review badge is removed. Your corrections also improve future AI accuracy.

tabs.title: Report Types
tabs.message: Switch between report types: E/A Income Statement (self-employed), Balance Sheet (Bilanz), Trial Balance (Saldenliste), Period Trial Balance (Periodensaldenliste), and Tax Form Preview (E1/E1a/U30).

generate.title: Generate Report
generate.message: Calculate the report for the selected tax year. The system pulls your latest transaction data and generates a detailed breakdown matching official Austrian tax form fields.

print.title: Print Report
print.message: Print the report directly from the browser. The print layout is optimized for A4 paper with proper headers and page breaks.

content.title: Report Content
content.message: The detailed tax calculation with each line mapped to official form fields. Expandable sections show the underlying transactions for each line item.

finanzOnline.title: FinanzOnline Integration
finanzOnline.message: Submit your tax return electronically to the Austrian tax authority (Finanzamt) via FinanzOnline. The form data is pre-filled from your transactions and documents.

downloadForm.title: Download & Export
downloadForm.message: Download the pre-filled official tax form as PDF, or export a complete tax package containing your tax return, all supporting documents, and a summary report in a single archive.

overview.title: Portfolio Overview
overview.message: Navigate to the asset portfolio dashboard for aggregated insights: total asset values, depreciation schedules, and comparative analytics across all your properties and assets.

add.title: Add Asset
add.message: Register a new asset: real estate, vehicles, equipment, machinery, or tools. Taxja calculates depreciation (AfA) based on Austrian tax law and tracks book values over time.

cards.title: Asset Cards
cards.message: Each card shows an asset with key details: name, type, purchase date, original cost, current book value, and depreciation status. Click to open the full detail view.

edit.title: Edit Asset
edit.message: Update asset details: purchase price, depreciation method (linear/degressive), useful life, or disposal information. Changes automatically recalculate depreciation schedules.

archive.title: Archive Toggle
archive.message: Show or hide archived/disposed assets. Archived items are retained for the 7-year legal retention period (BAO §132) but hidden from the main view.

summary.title: Asset Summary
summary.message: Key figures across all assets: total acquisition cost, current book value, annual depreciation expense, and net rental income from properties.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Comparison
portfolio.message: Compare properties side by side on key metrics: yield, occupancy rate, maintenance costs, and return on investment.

otherAssets.title: Other Assets
otherAssets.message: Non-property depreciable assets: vehicles, office equipment, machinery, and intangible assets. Each tracked with its own depreciation schedule.

reports.title: Asset Reports
reports.message: Generate detailed depreciation reports and asset inventories. Select the report type and year for comprehensive asset documentation.

actions.title: Property Actions
actions.message: Edit property details, view the depreciation schedule, dispose/sell the asset, or archive it. Access all management tools from this action menu.

info.title: Property Information
info.message: Core details: address, purchase date, acquisition cost, area (m²), depreciation method, useful life, and current book value.

contracts.title: Rental Contracts
contracts.message: Manage rental contracts: add tenants, set rent amounts and periods, track deposits, and monitor lease terms. Essential for Vermietung & Verpachtung reporting.

transactions.title: Property Transactions
transactions.message: All income and expenses linked to this property: rental income, maintenance costs, insurance, interest payments. Used directly for tax reporting.

overview.title: Liabilities Dashboard
overview.message: Aggregated view of all debts: total outstanding balance, monthly payment obligations, total interest paid, and debt-to-asset ratio.

add.title: Add Liability
add.message: Record a new loan, mortgage, or credit facility. Enter principal amount, interest rate, and repayment schedule. Link to a property if applicable — interest may be tax-deductible.

list.title: Liability List
list.message: All your loans and liabilities in one place. See current balance, interest rate, and next payment date. Click any item to view the full amortization schedule.

detail.title: Amortization Schedule
detail.message: Detailed repayment schedule showing principal and interest split for each payment. Track remaining balance, total interest paid, and linked property or asset.

create.title: Create Recurring Pattern
create.message: Set up a recurring transaction that repeats automatically: daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly. Ideal for regular expenses like rent, subscriptions, or insurance premiums.

filters.title: Filter Patterns
filters.message: Filter recurring entries by frequency, category, active/paused status, or amount range.

list.title: Recurring Patterns
list.message: View and manage all recurring transaction patterns. Taxja also auto-detects recurring patterns from your bank statements. Pause, edit, or delete schedules as needed.

assets.title: Assets & Liabilities
assets.message: Manage real estate, vehicles, equipment, and other depreciable assets with automatic AfA calculation. Also track loans, mortgages, and other liabilities with amortization schedules.

automation.title: Rules & Automation
automation.message: Set up recurring transactions for regular payments, and manage classification rules that automatically categorize transactions. Taxja learns from your corrections over time.

taxtools.title: Tax Workspace
taxtools.message: Advanced tax tools: refund estimator, what-if simulator, flat-rate comparison, annual tax data summary, employer documents workbench, and audit checklist.

refund.title: Tax Refund Estimate
refund.message: Estimate your expected tax refund or liability based on current income, deductions, and withheld tax. Shows a detailed breakdown of taxable income and applicable rates.

whatIf.title: What-If Simulator
whatIf.message: Model hypothetical scenarios: add extra income, adjust deductions, or change business expenses to see how they impact your tax position. Compare different scenarios side by side.

flatRate.title: Flat Rate Comparison
flatRate.message: Compare your actual documented expenses against the Betriebsausgabenpauschale (flat-rate business expenses). Shows which option gives you a better tax result — available for self-employed users.

filing.title: Annual Tax Summary
filing.message: Complete overview of your tax year: taxable income, estimated tax, withheld tax, estimated refund, income and deduction breakdowns, VAT summary, and conflict detection with warnings.

employer.title: Employer Documents
employer.message: Upload and review your Lohnzettel (L16) and other employment tax certificates. Taxja extracts employer info, gross salary, tax withholdings, and social insurance contributions. Supports multiple employers.

audit.title: Audit Checklist
audit.message: Verify your tax records are complete before filing: checks for missing documents, unreviewed transactions, incomplete categories, and compliance with Austrian tax requirements.

basicInfo.title: Personal Information
basicInfo.message: Your name, email, and display preferences. Keep these current for tax correspondence and account recovery.

taxInfo.title: Tax & Business Profile
taxInfo.message: Configure your tax number (Steuernummer), VAT ID (USt-ID), VAT status (small business exemption, regular), income type, business name, and industry. Essential for correct tax calculations.

commuting.title: Employment & Commuting
commuting.message: Set up employer details, commuting distance (km) for Pendlerpauschale, public transport availability, home-office (Telearbeit) days for Homeoffice-Pauschale, and family status for tax credits.

security.title: Security Settings
security.message: Change your password, review active sessions, and enable two-factor authentication (2FA) for enhanced account security.

dataExport.title: Data & Privacy
dataExport.message: Export all your data (documents, transactions, reports), manage subscription settings, or request account deletion. Your data belongs to you — fully GDPR compliant.

intro.title: Smart Classification
intro.message: Classification rules automatically assign tax categories to transactions based on description patterns. Taxja creates rules from your manual corrections, building a personalized classification engine that improves over time.

list.title: Rules List
list.message: View, edit, or delete classification rules. Each rule matches a text pattern (from transaction descriptions) to a specific tax category and deductibility status.

autoLearn.title: AI-Learned Rules
autoLearn.message: Rules automatically created by the AI from your past decisions. The counter shows how many transactions each rule has classified. Review and fine-tune as needed.

welcome.title: AI Tax Assistant
welcome.message: Your personal AI tax advisor for Austrian tax law. Ask questions in any of the 9 supported languages. The AI accesses your full profile, transactions, documents, and properties for personalized answers.

input.title: Chat Input
input.message: Type your tax question or use suggested prompts. Ask about deductions, VAT rules, filing deadlines, property depreciation, or any Austrian tax topic.

proactive.title: Proactive Insights
proactive.message: The AI proactively analyzes your data and suggests tax optimizations, flags missing documents, warns about approaching deadlines, and identifies potential errors before you file.

plan.title: Your Subscription
plan.message: View your current plan (Free, Plus, or Pro), billing cycle, next payment date, and included features. Free includes basic features, Plus adds advanced reports, Pro unlocks AI assistant and tax form generation.

billing.title: Billing & Payments
billing.message: Review payment history, manage your payment method via Stripe, cancel or reactivate your subscription, and view remaining trial days if applicable.

filter.title: Filter Credits
filter.message: Filter credit history by type: deductions (OCR/AI usage), refunds, monthly resets, top-up purchases, expired top-ups, overage settlements, or plan migrations.

list.title: Credit Transactions
list.message: Detailed log of all credit activity: when credits were used, how many, what for, and your remaining balance. Track AI usage across document processing and chat interactions.

credits.topup_subtitle: Top-up credits are valid for 12 months.

upgrade.trial_note: Start with a 14-day free trial of Pro plan

documents.sourceManagedPropertyLoanMessage: This liability is synced from a linked property loan. Open the linked property or contract flow to change it.

pendingContracts.title: Pending loan contracts
pendingContracts.subtitle: Loan contracts that are still under review or missing key fields stay here until you finish them in Documents.

assetOverview.pageSubtitle: Assets, depreciation, net worth, and individual reports in one place.
assetOverview.totalAssetsNote: Carrying value of all registered assets
assetOverview.totalLiabilitiesNote: Open balances across all active liabilities
assetOverview.balanceSnapshotHint: Current asset carrying values combined with all tracked liabilities.
assetOverview.annualDepreciationHint: Total depreciation across all properties and other assets for the current year.
